name: vercel-ai-transcription
title: Interactive Transcription
author: Vercel
description: A synchronized transcript whose segments expose active, past, and seek states.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Replaced the AI SDK type-only segment shape with an equivalent local structural type.
Changed text alignment to a logical RTL-aware utility.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Replaced the AI SDK type-only segment shape with an equivalent local structural type. Changed text alignment to a logical RTL-aware utility.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
